name: v1alpha1AWSAuthConfig
description: v1alpha1AWSAuthConfig schema from Argo CD API

profile.description: Profile contains optional role ARN. If set then AWS IAM Authenticator uses the profile to perform cluster operations instead of the default AWS credential provider chain.

roleARN.description: RoleARN contains optional role ARN. If set then AWS IAM Authenticator assume a role to perform cluster operations instead of the default AWS credential provider chain.
